ModuleTitle.helper: Administrator-facing title for this module. This is used for OpenContent and DNN management, not for public display.

ModuleAnchor.helper: Optional. Used to create a #jump-link on the page. Use only letters, numbers, and hyphens.

SectionHeading.helper: Optional public heading shown above the cards. HTML is allowed.

Cards.helper: Add as many cards as you want, but only the first 4 are rendered on the page.

Title.helper: Required. Main card title. HTML is allowed.

Eyebrow.helper: Required. Small label above the title. HTML is allowed.

Description.helper: Required. Short supporting text below the title. HTML is allowed.
Description.placeholder: A somatic reset for high-stress sprints.

Link.helper: Optional. If a link is added, the entire card becomes clickable.
